name: alindesign dotfiles
description: zsh + starship + CLI tools (fd, rg, bat, fzf, jq, delta, eza, zoxide) + nvim + git config, with optional GPG/SSH commit signing.

setDefaultShell.description: Set zsh as the default shell for the remote user

gitSigningFormat.description: Format for commit signing. 'gpg' installs gnupg + sets pinentry to loopback. 'ssh' configures git for SSH signing and skips gnupg. 'none' installs neither.

gitSigningKey.description: Signing key. For 'gpg': GPG key ID (e.g. '0xABCD1234' or fingerprint). For 'ssh': absolute path inside the container to your public SSH key (e.g. '/home/vscode/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub'). Empty leaves git unsigned even if format is set.

installNvim.description: Install neovim with a minimal config
